scoring_factors.notes: RHEL 7 EOL (Jun 2024), WebSphere 7.0 EOL (Sep 2015); Amazon RDS MySQL is managed/current
Medium criticality CRM; important for sales and marketing operations
Architecture type unknown (3rd party software); CRM system with 15 API endpoints
Already deployed on AWS; good cloud-native positioning
8 external interfaces, 15 API endpoints; high integration surface area for a 3rd party system
CI/CD present; not containerized - limited by 3rd party software constraints
3rd party software limits upgrade options to vendor-managed upgrades; RHEL and WebSphere must be coordinated with vendor

rationale: CRMApp-002 presents medium-high complexity due to a combination of severely outdated infrastructure components (WebSphere 7.0 is 10+ years past EOL, RHEL 7 EOL 2024) and the constraints imposed by being 3rd party software. While AWS deployment and CI/CD reduce some risk, the vendor dependency for component upgrades and the 8 external interfaces/15 API endpoints increase coordination complexity. WebSphere 7.0 replacement is the most critical action item.
